---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for orrery-tui
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that orrery-tui does not support well today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you want. Mockups, sketches, or scenario examples welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Any other tools or workarounds you have tried?

## Scope

- [ ] Physics / integrator
- [ ] TUI / rendering
- [ ] HORIZONS / scenarios
- [ ] Performance (Barnes–Hut, benchmarks)
- [ ] Docs / packaging
- [ ] Other

## Extra context

Optional links, papers, or references.
